name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for automigrate
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples. If this relates to a specific framework migration, include a before/after code example.
